name: Betty Ford's Blueberry Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
3. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Beat in the eggs, then add the mashed bananas.
5. Gradually mix in 2 cups of flour, reserving 2 tablespoons for coating the blueberries.
6. Sift the remaining dry ingredients (baking soda, baking powder, salt, and vanilla) into the batter with the reserved flour.
7. Fold the sifted dry ingredients into the banana mixture until just combined.
8. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of flour over the blueberries and coat them evenly.
9. Gently fold the coated blueberries into the batter.
10. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared loaf pans.
11. Bake for approximately 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
